rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when they refer to component ports, and in implementation scopes for implementation-level bindings.
Do not use subcomponent ports directly in component type contracts; represent them through valid variables or outputs.
generic_rules: When defining bounds or ranges in AGREE, use visible feature names and case-provided thresholds.
Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and expressions in AGREE contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use const declarations for named constants in AGREE annex blocks.
Formulate range checks as boolean expressions using comparison operators.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-specific assumptions or guarantees in component type scopes.
Do not reference subcomponent ports directly in component type contracts without proper variable representation.
